def negative_too_many_instance_attributes():
    rule_id = "too_many_instance_attributes"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Classes that assign an unusually large number of instance attributes across their methods."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
